title: Region
description: Commercial + regulatory zone belonging to a Tenant. Answers 'what currency, tax rules, timezone, and locale apply here?'. Orthogonal to Organization (structural sub-brand) — they meet at Branch, which carries FKs to both. Carries `tenant_id` ONLY — NEVER `application_id` (cascades through tenants), NEVER `organization_id` (orthogonal axis), NEVER `scope_node_id` (Region is a scope-node entity, not a scope consumer), NEVER `parent_id` (Regions are flat per tenant; sub-jurisdictions use `subdivision_code`). Exactly one `is_default=true` per tenant, seeded on TenantProvisioned. `country_code` + `currency` are IMMUTABLE once any inbound row (Branch, Membership, Invoice) references the Region — financial reconciliation depends on both. `tax_config.registration_number` is confidential-tier (redacted unless the caller carries `regions.view.tax_registration`).

x-eloquent.relations_note: `tenant()` belongsTo tenancy::Tenant via tenant_id (CASCADE). Downstream: hasMany branch::Branch (RESTRICT — the branch module owns the FK + the observer surfaces REGION_IN_USE as a clearer error than the DB constraint). Future consumers (finance::Membership, finance::Invoice, finance::Transaction) will hasMany via `region_id` on the child table + join through `BelongsToRegion`. No FK to Organization — regions are orthogonal.

x-database.description: One first-party table. Composite scoping via `tenant_id` only — no application_id column (cascades through tenants.application_id), no organization_id column (orthogonal axis), no scope_node_id column (Region is a scope-node entity, not a scope consumer). Two partial-unique indexes guard the two hard invariants: (tenant_id, slug) live-only, and (tenant_id) live-and-default-true.

tenant_id.description: Every Region belongs to a Tenant. Cascade delete on TenantErased — hooked via `PreventRegionOrphansOnTenantErased` for a graceful pre-delete audit pass.

name.description: Display name (e.g. 'United Arab Emirates', 'EU — Ireland', 'US — West Coast'). Not unique — two Regions may share a display name (different slugs).

slug.description: URL-safe identifier. Unique per (tenant_id, slug) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL. Regex `^[a-z][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$`.

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (uppercase). Nullable for supranational Regions (EU, GCC) when `region.validation.reject_unknown_country_code=false`. Otherwise required + must be present in `data/country-defaults.json`. IMMUTABLE once inbound rows exist (COUNTRY_CODE_IMMUTABLE 409).

subdivision_code.description: ISO 3166-2 subdivision (e.g. `US-CA`, `AE-DU`, `GB-SCT`). Nullable — most Regions cover a whole country. Used by the tax + address rendering layer for per-state / per-emirate nuance.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code (3 uppercase letters, e.g. USD, AED, GBP). IMMUTABLE once inbound rows exist (CURRENCY_IMMUTABLE 409 — historical financial records must remain reconcilable against their issued currency).

currency_symbol.description: Denormalised currency symbol (e.g. `$`, `AED`, `£`, `€`). Cached on the row so invoice + list rendering avoids a symbol lookup on every read.

timezone.description: IANA timezone identifier (e.g. `America/New_York`, `Asia/Dubai`). Rejected: deprecated aliases like `US/Pacific` — use canonical form. Determines when opening_hours + fiscal cutovers land.

locale.description: BCP-47 language tag (e.g. `en-US`, `ar-AE`, `fr-FR`). Determines default date + number + address formatting for the Region.

rtl.description: Denormalised right-to-left flag. Derived from locale (`ar-*`, `he-*`, `fa-*`, `ur-*`) on the observer's `creating` + `updating` hooks. Cached on the row so UI rendering avoids re-parsing on every read.

weekend_days.description: Array of day-of-week names (lowercase). Length 1-7 with no duplicates. Country defaults: Gulf countries (SA, KW, QA, OM, BH, JO, EG) commonly seed `[friday,saturday]`; UAE post-2022 seeds `[saturday,sunday]`; most of the rest seed `[saturday,sunday]`.

tax_config.description: Tax configuration blob. Sub-shape: default_rate_percent + name + inclusive + rates[] + registration_number + notes. `rates[]` is gated by the `region_custom_tax_rules` entitlement. `registration_number` is confidential-tier (redacted unless the caller carries `regions.view.tax_registration`).

default_rate_percent.description: Default rate applied to any line item. DECIMAL(5,3) precision.

name.description: Display name for the tax (e.g. `VAT`, `Sales Tax`, `GST`).

inclusive.description: True = list prices include tax; false = tax added at checkout.

rates.description: Multi-rate for jurisdictions with different rates per category. Enterprise-only via `region_custom_tax_rules` entitlement.

registration_number.description: Tenant's tax registration ID for this jurisdiction. Confidential-tier — redacted on egress unless the caller carries `regions.view.tax_registration`.

notes.description: Ops-only tax posture notes (e.g. 'Registered under UAE VAT effective 2018-01-01').

fiscal_year_start_month.description: Month (1-12) the tenant's fiscal year starts for this Region. Default 1 = January. Determines annual reporting cutovers. Common non-Jan values: UK/IE=4 (April), AU/NZ=7 (July), JP=4 (April), AE=1 (Gregorian).

status.description: Enum: active / paused / archived. Paused = new bookings + memberships refused; existing rows survive. Archived = soft-deleted; hidden from selectors. Same lifecycle model as Organization.

is_default.description: Exactly one is_default=true per tenant. Auto-demote on flip (RegionObserver). Cannot be deleted / archived / paused (409 with specific error codes). Enforced by partial unique index + observer + reconciler.

sort_order.description: Ascending sort in Region-picker UI. Defaults to 100 so seeded default Regions (sort_order=0) sort first.

notes.description: Ops-only notes. Hidden from tenant-plane responses (internal-tier).

metadata.description: Free-form metadata bag (from HasMetadata trait). Never exposed on the wire without `?include=metadata` + metadata-read permission.

indexes.name: regions_tenant_slug_unique
indexes.description: One live slug per tenant. Soft-deleted rows do not collide.

indexes.name: regions_tenant_default_unique
indexes.predicate: is_default = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
indexes.description: Enforces exactly-one-default per tenant at the DB level. Belt-and-braces on top of the observer's auto-demote logic.

indexes.name: regions_tenant_status_sort_idx
indexes.description: Picker query: active Regions for a tenant, sorted.

indexes.name: regions_tenant_country_idx
indexes.description: Reporting query: how many Regions per country per tenant?

indexes.name: regions_tenant_currency_idx
indexes.description: Reporting query: what currencies is this tenant transacting in?

country_code.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2. Nullable for supranational Regions when `region.validation.reject_unknown_country_code=false`.

timezone.description: IANA identifier. Rejected: deprecated aliases like `US/Pacific`.

registration_number.description: Confidential — redacted on egress unless the caller carries `regions.view.tax_registration`.

display_label.description: Computed. `<name> (<country_code>)` when country_code is set, else `<name>`.

is_in_use.description: Computed. True when any inbound row (Branch, Membership, Invoice, Transaction) references this Region.

inbound_reference_count.description: Computed via inbound-count aggregate. Included on show responses; suppressed on list responses unless `?include=inbound_reference_count` (list computation is N+1 without a rollup cache).

tax_registration_redacted.description: Computed. True when the response body has redacted `tax_config.registration_number` because the caller lacks `regions.view.tax_registration`.

accepts: slug (case-insensitive, matches slug column within the resolved tenant)

invariants: COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_default=true) = 1 per tenant_id (enforced by unique index + observer + reconciler).
country_code IS NULL OR country_code MATCHES /^[A-Z]{2}$/ (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 uppercase, enforced by rule + observer).
country_code IS IMMUTABLE once at least one inbound row references the Region (COUNTRY_CODE_IMMUTABLE — enforced by observer).
currency IS IMMUTABLE once at least one inbound row references the Region (CURRENCY_IMMUTABLE — enforced by observer; break-glass bypass via `region.validation.allow_currency_immutable_bypass`).
timezone IS a member of PHP `\DateTimeZone::listIdentifiers()` (rejected: deprecated aliases like `US/Pacific`).
locale IS a syntactically valid BCP-47 tag (enforced by rule + observer).
weekend_days IS a non-empty array of 1-7 unique day-of-week names.
tax_config.rates[] is empty UNLESS the tenant carries `region_custom_tax_rules` entitlement (enforced by observer — refuses at write time).
tax_config.default_rate_percent IS in [0, 100] with 3-decimal precision (matches DECIMAL(5,3) storage).
is_default=true rows CANNOT be deleted, archived, or paused (CANNOT_DELETE_DEFAULT_REGION / CANNOT_ARCHIVE_DEFAULT_REGION / CANNOT_PAUSE_DEFAULT_REGION — 409).
Regions in use CANNOT be archived or deleted (REGION_IN_USE 409 — enforced by observer, DB RESTRICT is fallback).
Retroactive tax_config edits refused UNLESS the tenant carries `region_time_travel` entitlement AND the `region.time_travel_execution` feature flag is on (REGION_TIME_TRAVEL_DISABLED — 402).
